title: Mastering `font-display` for Superior Web Font Performance & UX
tweet: Boost your website's performance and UX! Learn how to use `font-display` effectively to control web font loading behavior, eliminate FOIT/FOUT, and ensure a smooth user experience. #WebTypography #CSS #UXDesign #WebFonts #UIDesign
tip: To prevent Flash of Invisible Text (FOIT) or Flash of Unstyled Text (FOUT) and significantly improve user experience, strategically employ the `font-display` CSS property within your `@font-face` rules. For primary content fonts, `font-display: swap;` offers a good balance, displaying fallback text immediately and swapping to the web font once loaded. For less critical fonts or when absolute performance is paramount, consider `font-display: optional;` to avoid network requests if the font isn't already cached, ensuring zero layout shift.
